# TMR Electrical Services Ltd

> NICEIC approved electrical contractors based in Stroud, Gloucestershire, UK. Specialists in commercial, industrial and domestic electrical contracting since the 1990s.

## Who We Are

TMR Electrical Services Ltd is a NICEIC approved and SMAS certified electrical contracting company. We are based at Unit 3 Merretts Mill, Woodchester, Stroud, Gloucestershire, GL5 5EX.

- Phone: 01453 835100
- Email: mail@tmres.co.uk
- VAT: 255464002
- Accreditations: NICEIC Approved Contractor, SMAS Certified

## What We Do

- **Electrical Contracting** — commercial, industrial and domestic installations
- **LED Lighting** — design, supply and installation of energy-efficient lighting systems
- **Solar PV Maintenance** — ongoing maintenance and servicing of solar photovoltaic systems
- **Electrical Testing & Inspection** — fixed wire testing, EICR reports
- **PAT Testing** — portable appliance testing for businesses and landlords
- **24-Hour Breakdown Service** — emergency callout available

## Areas Served

Based in Stroud, Gloucestershire. Projects undertaken across the United Kingdom including Gloucestershire, Worcestershire, Lancashire, Berkshire and beyond.

## Notable Projects

- **Stratford Park Leisure Centre** (Stroud, Gloucestershire) — full electrical installation for the leisure centre redevelopment
- **Worcester Warriors Rugby Stadium** — electrical installation works at Sixways Stadium
- **Preston Solar PV Install** (Lancashire) — commercial solar photovoltaic installation
- **Reading Solar PV Install** (Berkshire) — commercial solar photovoltaic installation

## Apprenticeship Programme

TMR Electrical Services runs an electrical apprenticeship programme, taking on apprentices and training them to become qualified electricians.
